paragraphs.en: By Rachel Syme, Emily Nussbaum, Jane Bua, Sheldon Pearce, Inkoo Kang, Vince Aletti, and Richard Brody
paragraphs.zh: 作者：Rachel Syme、Emily Nussbaum、Jane Bua、Sheldon Pearce、Inkoo Kang、Vince Aletti 和 Richard Brody。

paragraphs.en: You’re reading the Goings On newsletter, a guide to what we’re watching, listening to, and doing this week. Sign up to receive it in your inbox.
paragraphs.zh: 你正在阅读《Goings On》通讯，这是一份本周我们在看、在听和在做的内容导览。点击订阅，可将它直接发送到你的邮箱。

paragraphs.en: The first tarot cards, from fifteenth-century Italy, were, essentially, playing cards. Known as carte de trionfi, the cards formed the basis of a popular game played in Milanese courts: in addition to the fifty-two pip cards one might find in a standard set of playing cards, the tarot deck added twenty-one cards to the mix, the trionfi, or “triumphs,” which featured mystical imagery combined with scenes of daily Renaissance life. Few of these original tarot cards remain—the scant number that are left are part of what are known as the Visconti-Sforza decks, none of which are complete—and they had more to do with passing the time than telling one’s fortune. It was not until the eighteenth century that people began to use the cards for occult readings.
paragraphs.zh: 最早的塔罗牌来自15世纪的意大利，本质上是扑克牌。这些牌被称为“卡尔特·德·崔翁菲”（carte de trionfi），并构成了米兰宫廷流行的一种纸牌游戏基础：在标准扑克牌中的五十二张点数牌之外，塔罗牌组还加入了二十一张“tri onfi”牌，即“胜利牌”，其中融合了神秘图像与文艺复兴时期日常生活场景。现存的原始塔罗牌很少，现存的少量牌被归入“维斯孔蒂-斯福尔扎（Visconti-Sforza）牌组”，并且这些牌组都不完整；当时它们与其说是用来占卜，不如说更像是用来消遣时光的游戏。直到18世纪，人们才开始把这些牌用于神秘学占卜。

paragraphs.en: (Left to right) Queen of Swords, Death, and Time from the Visconti-Sforza tarot cards by Bonifacio Bembo. Milan or Cremona, Italy, ca. 1456-58.Art works by Bonifacio Bembo / Courtesy Morgan Library & Museum
paragraphs.zh: （从左到右）博尼法斯·本博创作的《维斯孔蒂-斯福尔扎塔罗牌》中的剑王后、死亡和时间牌。意大利米兰或克雷莫纳，约公元1456–58年。博尼法斯·本博作品，图片由摩根图书馆与博物馆提供。

paragraphs.en: In the years since, tarot has evolved into not only a New Age trend but a bustling form of artistic expression; beyond the classic Rider-Waite-Smith deck of 1909, you can now find a tarot deck customized for nearly every interest—there’s cat tarot, “Peanuts” tarot, pasta tarot, and even “Tarot del Toro,” inspired by Guillermo del Toro films. The evolution of the cards over generations forms the basis of “Tarot! Renaissance Symbols, Modern Visions,” a new, two-part exhibition running at the Morgan Library & Museum, through Oct. 4. The first section of the show displays rare early tarot decks, while the second highlights artists, such as the Surrealists Leonora Carrington and Niki de Saint Phalle, who have reinterpreted the Major Arcana—twenty-two cards representing significant aspects of life—in wild and wacky ways.—Rachel Syme
paragraphs.zh: 在此后岁月里，塔罗牌不仅演变为一种“新时代”潮流，也发展成一种蓬勃的艺术表达形式；除1909年经典的Rider-Waite-Smith牌组外，如今几乎可以找到为各种兴趣定制的塔罗牌——有猫咪塔罗、《花生漫画》塔罗、意面塔罗，甚至有受吉列尔莫·德尔·托罗电影启发的“Tarot del Toro”。代际间卡牌的演化正是“Tarot! Renaissance Symbols, Modern Visions”这一新一轮双展的基础，该展于摩根图书馆与博物馆展出，持续到10月4日。展览第一部分展示了罕见的早期塔罗牌，第二部分则聚焦画家和艺术家，如超现实主义者莱诺拉·卡林顿与尼基·德·圣·法尔，展现她们对“大阿卡那牌”（象征人生重大层面的二十二张牌）的狂野而古怪的再诠释————Rachel Syme

paragraphs.en: In Victoria Lynne Barclay’s startlingly intimate play “Camping,” two trailer-park girls share a beat-up tent, every few years, over three decades, as their paths fork along class lines. They are best friends, secret-sharers; their battles feel brutal, world-shattering. “Camping” is part of a modern wave of smart art about the humiliations and passions of girlhood, from “John Proctor Is the Villain” to the TV series “PEN15”; it shares some DNA with “Heated Rivalry,” as well, in its exploration of buried desire. But the defiant two-hander, directed by Adrienne Campbell-Holt for Colt Coeur, has a distinctive, gritty force all its own, deepened by the committed performances of Alice Kremelberg and Colby Minifie, whose chemistry builds toward an inferno.—Emily Nussbaum (HERE; through July 11.)
paragraphs.zh: 在维多利亚·林·巴克利的触目惊心而极为贴近的戏剧《Camping》里，两位住在拖车公园的女孩在三十多年里每隔几年共享同一顶破旧帐篷，直到某一刻她们的道路按阶级界线分岔。她们是最好的朋友、秘密的倾诉者；她们的对抗听起来残酷，像世界崩塌。

paragraphs.en: In 1896, a formerly enslaved hotel waiter named William Dorsey Swann was convicted in Washington, D.C., for “keeping a disorderly house.” The disorder in question? Hosting drag balls. Swann is widely considered to be the first self-identifying drag queen in America, putting on revelrous evenings complete with gowns, booze, and queer joy—a bright act of expression amid the mud of nineteenth-century society. Swann bravely sought a pardon for his charge, and, though denied, his efforts solidified him as a pioneer of L.G.B.T.Q.I.A.+ resistance. National Sawdust spotlights Swann’s legacy with a sing-through of Tamar-kali’s vocal chamber work “The Swann,” a meditation on identity, external judgment, and self-celebration.—Jane Bua (National Sawdust; July 10.)
paragraphs.zh: 1896年，一名曾被奴役的华盛顿特区酒店服务员威廉·多西·斯旺（William Dorsey Swann）因“经营混乱场所”而被定罪。所说的“混乱”是指举办变装舞会。斯旺普遍被认为是美国首位自我认同的变装皇后，他举办过狂欢夜会，服装华丽、酒杯满满，充满同志欢愉——在19世纪社会污浊泥泞中的一次明亮的表达行为。斯旺勇敢地申请赦免，尽管被拒绝，但他的努力使他巩固为L.G.B.T.Q.I.A.+抵抗的先驱。National Sawdust以塔马-卡莉（Tamar-kali）创作的声乐室内乐《The Swann》演唱式呈现，聚焦其遗产，这部作品沉思了身份、外界评判与自我庆祝————Jane Bua（National Sawdust；7月10日）

paragraphs.en: Original Koffee performs at the 2026 New Orleans Jazz & Heritage Festival.Photograph by Erika Goldring / Getty
paragraphs.zh: Original Koffee 在2026年新奥尔良爵士与遗产音乐节上演出。照片：Erika Goldring / Getty

paragraphs.en: Few artists have been more of a load-bearer for a scene—in this case, the reggae revival of the twenty-tens—than Original Koffee, previously just Koffee. She seems to perfectly synthesize the music of Jamrock with sounds of the broader Black diaspora. Support from the legendary Jamaican sprinter Usain Bolt launched her into a transformational run for the genre. For her fluid, rule-challenging 2019 EP, “Rapture,” she was the first woman to win the Grammy for best reggae album, and her début LP, “Gifted,” from 2022, placed her at the forefront of a sonic evolution that exploded distinctions of “old” and “new” in reggae music. She is a carrier of the movement’s legacy, but her voice refuses to be confined by its history.—Sheldon Pearce (Paradise Coney Island; July 11.)
paragraphs.zh: 在任何一个场景中，很少有艺术家像Original Koffee（此前仅以Koffee出道）那样承担了这么多重担——在本世纪二十年代的雷鬼复兴浪潮里，她几乎是扛旗者。她似乎把Jamrock的音乐与更广泛黑人散居文化中的声音完美地融合在一起。来自牙买加传奇短跑运动员博尔特（Usain Bolt）的支持，使她在这一类型的转型浪潮中一举起步。她在2019年的EP《Rapture》里，以流畅又挑战规则的方式表达自己，成为第一位赢得“最佳雷鬼专辑”格莱美奖的女性，而她2022年的首张LP《Gifted》则把她推到了雷鬼音乐中“古老”与“新潮”界限被彻底打破的声音演进前沿。她是这一运动遗产的承载者，却从不让自己的嗓音被其历史所束缚。——谢尔顿·珀斯（《天堂海滩科尼岛》；7月11日）

paragraphs.en: The Netflix dramedy “The Four Seasons,” co-created by Tina Fey, is a remake of a 1981 film by Alan Alda. Like the film, the series follows a trio of well-heeled couples, including the high-strung Kate (Fey) and her soft-hearted husband, Jack (Will Forte), and the more sexually adventurous Danny (Colman Domingo) and Claude (Marco Calvani), who are all close enough to travel together every few months—and enmeshed enough that when the third couple, Nick (Steve Carell) and Anne (Kerri Kenney-Silver), split up, the remaining pairs spin out. “The Four Seasons,” now in its second season—which benefits tremendously from having shaken off the source material—is in many respects an overly tidy, milquetoast entertainment, but Fey’s treatment of relationships in midlife feels refreshingly rooted in reality.—Inkoo Kang (Now streaming.)
paragraphs.zh: 网飞剧集《四季》（The Four Seasons）由蒂娜·菲（Tina Fey）联袂创作，改编自艾伦·艾尔达（Alan Alda）的1981年电影。和电影一样，该剧围绕一对三对生活殷实的伴侣展开：包括神经质的凯特（Fey）和她温柔善良的丈夫杰克（Will Forte），以及更敢于尝试性冒险的丹尼（Colman Domingo）和克劳德（Marco Calvani）；这几对人关系够亲近，能每隔几个月一同外出旅行；同时又纠缠紧密，以致当第三对夫妻尼克（Steve Carell）和安妮（Kerri Kenney-Silver）分手后，剩下的几对关系开始失控。如今已进入第二季、且已经摆脱原作包袱的《四季》在许多方面都像一部过于整洁、平平无奇的喜剧化剧作，但菲对中年关系的处理却出乎意料地贴近现实。——Inkoo Kang（可在线观看）

paragraphs.en: “Composite of Shirley Berman and Madison Grammar School, Topanga Canyon,” from 1956.Photograph by Edmund Teske / Courtesy © Edmund Teske Archives / Laurence Bump and Nils Vidstrand
paragraphs.zh: 《Shirley Berman与Madison Grammar School、Topanga Canyon的复合体》（1956年）。摄影：埃德蒙·特斯克（Edmund Teske）/ 摄影档案馆版权所有，劳伦斯·贝姆（Laurence Bump）与尼尔斯·维德斯特兰（Nils Vidstrand）致敬。

paragraphs.en: Deborah Bell runs a small, eccentric photo gallery in Chelsea. Her speciality is vintage material, but that never limits her range. Bell’s current show, “Abstract Visions & Uncommon Portraits,” is a miscellany that includes portraiture (August Sander, Clarence John Laughlin) but focusses on discoveries in avant-garde still-life and abstraction. Edmund Teske slips between genres with two small, dreamy images that layer a woman’s face over the façades of old buildings, like memories that refuse to fade. László Moholy-Nagy hovers low over a gaggle of pigeons, suspending the viewer uneasily between protector and predator. In a room full of little mysteries, Rose Mandel’s stand out. Her study of tangled foliage is classic modernism, but her two seascapes, seen through luminescent bubbles, are visionary in the vein of Hilma af Klint.—Vince Aletti (Deborah Bell; through July 2.)
paragraphs.zh: 黛博拉·贝尔（Deborah Bell）在切尔西开设了一家小而古怪的摄影画廊。她的专长在于复古素材，但这并未限制她的范围。贝尔当前展出的《抽象视界与非常规肖像》是一场百家杂陈的展览，包含肖像（奥古斯特·桑德，克拉伦斯·约翰·劳克林）在内，但重点放在先锋静物与抽象领域的新发现上。埃德蒙·特斯克以两张小巧而梦幻的作品跨越流派，层层叠加出一张女人面孔与旧建筑立面的影像，像是永不消逝的记忆。拉兹洛·莫霍利-纳吉（László Moholy-Nagy）在一群鸽子上空低空盘旋，让观者在“守护者”与“捕食者”之间产生不安的悬停感。在满是小谜团的展厅里，罗丝·曼德尔（Rose Mandel）的作品最为醒目。她对盘结树叶的研究是纯粹的现代主义典范；而她的两幅海景则通过发光的泡泡观看，具有希尔玛·阿夫·克林特（Hilma af Klint）风格的预言般远见。——Vince Aletti（Deborah Bell；展期至7月2日）

paragraphs.en: In “The Death of Robin Hood,” starring Hugh Jackman, the writer and director Michael Sarnoski presents the legendary hero as a thirteenth-century serial killer who, with his crude companion Little John (Bill Skarsgård), leaves a bloody trail of poor people in the English countryside. Badly wounded in a battle of revenge, Robin Hood is brought to a priory and tended by Sister Brigid (Jodie Comer), whose generosity awakens his finer feelings and spurs him to virtuous, self-sacrificing action. But neither part of the drama comes alive; the early scenes, in which Robin Hood bathes in gore, are a hollow churn, and the redemptive warmth of the protagonist’s monastic retreat comes off as a superficial, sentimental slog.—Richard Brody (In wide release.)
paragraphs.zh: 在休·杰克曼主演的《罗宾·霍德之死》中，编剧兼导演迈克尔·萨诺斯基将这位传奇英雄塑造成一位十三世纪的连环杀手；在他那粗野的伙伴“小约翰”（比尔·斯卡斯加德）陪同下，他们在英格兰乡村留下了一串血淋淋的穷人尸体。罗宾·霍德在一场复仇战斗中重伤，被带到一座修道院，由修女布丽奇德（乔迪·科默）照顾；她的善良唤醒了他更高尚的情感，并促使他走向高尚、无私的行动。然而，戏剧的两部分都未能真正立起来：前段中罗宾·霍德在血泊中沐浴的场景空洞无物，而主人公进入修道院后获得救赎般温暖的段落则显得流于表面、情绪化且拖沓。——理查德·布罗迪（院线上映中）

paragraphs.en: In Steven Spielberg’s “Disclosure Day,” he presents aliens as saviors. Richard Brody shares some of the wider and wilder alien movies available to stream.
paragraphs.zh: 在史蒂文·斯皮尔伯格的《披露日》中，他将外星人描绘为救世者。理查德·布罗迪分享了更多可在线观看的更广阔、更狂野的外星题材电影。

paragraphs.en: 1. The Cold War gave rise to paranoid visions of space invasions, as in the low-budget, high-anxiety thriller “Earth vs. the Flying Saucers,” from 1956. The creatures’ arrival is marked by violence; their weaponry, brought to life with stark special effects, heralds an intergalactic war of conquest and sparks an arms race; and a destructive showdown in Washington, D.C., is heavily symbolic and inescapably political.
paragraphs.zh: 1. 冷战催生了关于太空入侵的偏执幻想，例如1956年的低成本高焦虑惊悚片《地球对抗飞碟》。这些生物的降临与暴力紧密相连；通过简洁却强烈的特效展现出的武器，预示着一场征服的星际战争，并引发军备竞赛；而在华盛顿特区发生的毁灭性对决也高度象征化，且无法避开政治意味。

paragraphs.en: 2. John Sayles’s poignant and rowdy 1984 satire, “The Brother from Another Planet,” stars Joe Morton as an extraterrestrial who has taken the form of a Black man and then makes his way to Harlem. The visitor—who understands English but can’t speak—gradually learns to fit in while deploying his few but startling paranormal abilities. He also reveals that he was enslaved in space, leading to bitterly ironic results.
paragraphs.zh: 2. 约翰·塞尔斯在1984年的讽刺片《来自另一个星球的兄弟》（The Brother from Another Planet）感人而狂放。影片由乔·莫顿主演，他饰演一名外星人，化身为一位黑人，随后来到哈莱姆。这个访客会说英语但不会说话，他在逐渐掌握少数却令人震惊的超自然能力的过程中，慢慢学会了如何融入其中。他还透露自己曾在太空中遭受奴役，由此引发了带有苦涩讽刺意味的结局。

paragraphs.en: 3. Bruno Dumont’s three-hour-plus comedy “Coincoin and the Extra-Humans,” from 2018, is a sequel to his 2014 drama, “Li’l Quinquin,” but doesn’t depend on it. The action, set on France’s rugged northern coast, is anchored by teen romance, involves far-right anti-migrant activists, and is complicated by blue goo from space that creates clones—including of the two loopy police officers who investigate. The spectacularly antic tale of originals and doubles, locals and outsiders, visually and philosophically lampoons the very concept of identity.
paragraphs.zh: 3. 布鲁诺·杜蒙（Bruno Dumont）2018年的三小时加长喜剧片《Coincoin and the Extra-Humans》是他2014年戏剧片《Li’l Quinquin》的续作，但并不依赖于前作。故事设定在法国崎岖的北海岸，核心是青春期恋情，并涉及极右翼的反移民活动分子；情节又被来自太空的蓝色粘液所复杂化，这种粘液会制造克隆体，包括两位调查此事的古怪警官。这个关于“原体”与“复制体”、本地人与外来者的夸张滑稽故事，在视觉与思想上都嘲讽了“身份”这一概念本身。
